Description (short): SINC is the utility token of SINCOR — a swarm of 43 autonomous AI agents operating on Base.
Description (long): SINC is the utility token of SINCOR, a production AI agent swarm on Base mainnet. Contracts are Sourcify-verified with CertiK Skynet 97/100. Fixed 100M supply, 8 decimals, no mint, no admin keys. SINC powers access to the agent network, curated sales, and on-chain coordination via Uniswap v4 limit-order infrastructure.
Trust: Sourcify full-match verified · CertiK Skynet 97/100 · SolidityScan Low Risk 98.5/100 · No mint function · No admin pause/withdraw · Fixed 100M supply
